headline: Costco Tariff Refunds Could Reinforce Low Prices And Membership Value
summary: Costco Wholesale (NasdaqGS:COST) is positioned to receive tariff refunds following a federal trade court ruling. Management has indicated an intent to pass potential tariff relief through to members via lower prices. The ruling and refund process are expected to affect a wide range of importers, not just Costco. Costco operates a global membership warehouse model that focuses on high volumes and low prices across categories such as groceries, household goods, and discretionary items. Any...

headline: BJ’s Wholesale makes bold move to lure more shoppers
summary: BJ’s Wholesale, one of the top three warehouse clubs in the U.S., continues to see cautious consumer behavior in its stores. With heightened competition from Costco, Walmart’s Sam’s Club and other rivals, BJ’s is doubling down on a bold strategy to attract more customers. In the fourth quarter of ...

headline: Citi Maintains Neutral Rating on Costco Wholesale Corporation (COST) with $1000 Target
summary: Costco Wholesale Corporation (NASDAQ:COST) is one of the 10 best stocks to invest in during a recession. On February 27, 2026, Costco Wholesale Corporation (NASDAQ:COST) received a Neutral rating from Citi, maintained by analyst Steven Zaccone, with a price target of $1,000. Previously, on February 20, 2026, Steven raised the stock’s price target from $990 […]

headline: Costco CFO answers special dividend question
summary: Whenever Costco’s cash flow comes up, one question looms. Will the company pay a special dividend? Executives are happy to talk around it without giving a straight answer. History shows they’ve done it before, and with cash piling up again, investors are left wondering if another surprise could be ...
